The multi-GNSS, multi-frequency HA32 is a high-performance UAV GNSS antenna designed to receive GPS, BeiDou, GLONASS, Galileo, QZSS, SBAS, and Atlas L-band signals.

products.name: Vector™ VS-i8 Inertial Navigation System
products.descriptor: GNSS-INS with Honeywell sensor fusion delivering position, velocity, roll, pitch, and heading for UAV, marine, and robotics

evidence.snippet: Vector™ VS-i8 Inertial Navigation System

The Hemisphere VS-i8 is a high accuracy, high precision, Inertial Navigation System (INS) product. Featuring Honeywell® proprietary sensor fusion technology, the VS-i8 leverages a powerful multi-frequency, multi-constellation, RTK-ready navigation and positioning solution for a wide variety of GNSS platforms and applications.

products.name: Phantom™ 20 & 34 GNSS OEM Boards
products.descriptor: Low-power multi-frequency multi-GNSS OEM position boards with 800+ channels and Atlas L-band support

evidence.snippet: Phantom™ 20 & 34 GNSS OEM Boards

*   Multi-Frequency GPS, GLONASS, BeiDou, Galileo, and QZSS
*   Long-range RTK baselines up to 50 km with fast acquisition times
*   Compatible with many RTK sources including Hemisphere GNSS’ ROX format, RTCM, CMR, CMR+
*   Mechanically and electrically (pin-for-pin) compatible with many other manufacturers’ modules
*   Atlas® L-band capable to 4 cm RMS

products.name: A65 Antenna
products.descriptor: Multi-frequency multi-GNSS precision antenna for land and marine use with millimeter-level accuracy

evidence.snippet: A65 Antenna

The A65 GNSS antenna is engineered to deliver millimeter level accuracy for both land and marine applications. It supports current and future GNSS signals, including GPS,GLONASS, BeiDou, and Galileo, ensuring long-term reliability.

OEM Development Kit ST The Universal Development Kit ST allows you to integrate a Hemisphere GNSS OEM board into your design. The Universal Development Kit ST supports the following Hemisphere GNSS OEM boards:
*   Vega™\-based OEM boards
*   Phantom™\-based OEM boards

products.name: R632 GNSS Receiver
products.descriptor: Compact multi-GNSS receiver with heading capability and Atlas L-band corrections to 4 cm worldwide

evidence.snippet: R632 GNSS Receiver

The R632’s standard configuration offers multiple methods of connectivity and an impressive array of wireless communications. Through Hemisphere’s Atlas correction network, the R632 offers worldwide stand-alone positioning to 4 cm.

products.name: SBX-4 DGPS Beacon OEM Board
products.descriptor: Dual-channel DGPS beacon OEM board providing RTCM SC-104 differential corrections from worldwide beacon networks

evidence.snippet: SBX-4 DGPS Beacon OEM Board

Provide a reliable source of differential corrections with the SBX-4 radiobeacon board that augments a separate GPS receiver with free accuracy-improving correction data from networks of beacon stations located throughout the world.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claims found for any individual product in the corpus; the compliance page (resource-0026) contains only EU Declaration of Conformity and CE marks, not NDAA language.
Blue UAS Cleared List status not mentioned anywhere in the corpus for any product.
